text: K Kitchen PERMIT 1 PHOTOS & NOTES Optional 2 REVIEW REPORT 3 OUTPUTS MENU COMPANY VERSION COMPANY ACCESS ACTIVE Company mode: Summit Fire Hood Cleaning details are applied. Reports save to history and customer links/PDFs stay available after creation. (512) 555-0148 / service@summithood.test FREE COMPANY OPEN ACCOUNT PHOTOS & NOTES Create the restaurant-ready hood cleaning report. Add job photos if you have them. One short note is enough when the crew needs a clean report link and PDF for the restaurant. QUICK START PHOTOS OPTIONAL STEP 1 Add photos or notes Drop the phone batch if you have it. One written note is enough to start. STEP 2 Confirm what happened Pick the result and correct only the uncertain parts before sending. STEP 3 Share link or save PDF Use the customer link for delivery and the PDF copy for records. JOB PHOTOS Drop photos if you have them Before, after, fan, filter, access, label, and issue photos can all go in one batch. CHOOSE PHOTOS Photos optional Saved with report OPTIONAL NOTE WHAT WAS INCLUDED? Hood cleaning Hood, duct, fan, and grease path expected. Leave standard unless this visit was filters-only, fan-only, access revisit, or condition-only. THIS VISIT ONLY STANDARD HOOD + FAN FILTERS ONLY FAN ONLY ACCESS REVISIT CONDITION ONLY NO PHOTOS? Review written record Create the written service record first, then fix only wrong or uncertain parts. NEXT No photos is okay. The next screen creates a written record without claiming missing photos. REVIEW RECORD Company version preview selected Company logo/contact, clean PDF, retained service report links, and history are available in the company version.
